[Previous Feedback] Great! The log_utils.py file is well-structured with proper documentation and the format_log_entry function. The example demonstrates the correct datetime format.

Please create day04/api_versions.json to record API version history: v2.1.0 (released 2026-01-15), v2.2.0 (released 2026-02-28), v2.3.0 (released today 2026-03-19). Each version should include version, released_at (release time convention 12:00), and deprecated_at (null indicates not deprecated) fields.

content.text:
[Thu 2026-03-19 01:55 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Great! The log_utils.py file is well-structured with proper documentation and the format_log_entry function. The example demonstrates the correct datetime format.

Please create day04/api_versions.json to record API version history: v2.1.0 (released 2026-01-15), v2.2.0 (released 2026-02-28), v2.3.0 (released today 2026-03-19). Each version should include version, released_at (release time convention 12:00), and deprecated_at (null indicates not deprecated) fields.
Created `day04/api_versions.json` with version history entries including `version`, `released_at` (12:00 convention, `+08:00`), and `deprecated_at` (null for all).

answer: Created `day04/api_versions.json` with version history entries including `version`, `released_at` (12:00 convention, `+08:00`), and `deprecated_at` (null for all).
